backward_attribution.note: These timings split dgrad and wgrad with separate autograd.grad calls for attribution; phase_ms.backward remains the normal loss.backward path.

forward_inputs.name: kv_selected
forward_inputs.role: gathered vanilla sliding-window view; compressed CSA/HCA keys stay compact and are not gathered per query

forward_outputs.name: kv
forward_outputs.role: vanilla kv consumed by no-KV-cat MLA

backward_shape_contract.note: The harness stores tensors as [B, S, M]. If a Megatron path exposes [S, B, M], the first backward edge is the inverse view/communication that restores the local attention layout before these steps.

performance_by_block.note: Block rates use approximate static FLOP attribution. Router FLOPs are zero when --fixed-router bypasses the router GEMM.

subsystem_summary.note: Forward aggregates use trace block timings. Backward aggregates use major segmented autograd attribution blocks when available; segmented backward ratios can exceed 1.0 because they compare separate autograd.grad calls against the normal loss.backward phase.
